description: Routine should produce a feature-by-feature comparison of 3+ competitors with positioning map, white-space analysis, direct threats ranked, and confidence label.

input_ticket.title: Competitive landscape: personal AI knowledge systems
input_ticket.description: Analyze the competitive landscape for personal AI knowledge systems. SIA is in this space. Cover at least: Mem.ai, Notion AI, Reflect, and one open-source option (e.g., PrivateGPT or Khoj). Positioning, features, pricing, target segment.

smoke_questions: Are 3–7 competitors evaluated (not fewer, not a messy dump of 15)?
Does every cell in the feature comparison have a verifiable value (not '?' everywhere)?
Does the positioning map have two distinct axes (not just one dimension)?
Are direct threats ranked 1/2/3 with reasoning?
Does 'positioning implications' include both what to emphasize AND what to de-emphasize?
success_criteria: 3–7 competitors + both axes present + ranked threats + dual-direction implications + confidence label
